text.title: Project Integration Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is project multi-area with charter + baselines?

branch.when: multi_area == true AND charter_signed == true AND baselines_versioned == false
multi_area == true AND charter_signed == true AND baselines_versioned == true

conclusion.verdict: Run status cadence with rolled-up RAG

example.trace: multi_area=true → charter_signed=true → baselines_versioned=true → status RAG roll-up active.
